message:
fix(codegen): Universal improvements for all test groups

- Add stringSplitWhitespace export to runtime.zig
- Fix list literal label syntax in collections codegen
- Add test.test_* module stubs to module_aliases.zig
- Improve string comparison operator handling
- Fix for loop variable naming to avoid shadowing
- Add container_dispatch.zig for type-safe container operations

These fixes apply universally across core1, core2, and core3 test groups.
